chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الْحَجِّ وَ الْعُمْرَةِ وَ ثَوَابِهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Merits of the Hajj and the Umra, and their Rewards

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/131)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/131)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي أَحُجُّ سَنَةً وَ شَرِيكِي سَنَةً قَالَ مَا يَمْنَعُكَ مِنَ الْحَجِّ يَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ قُلْتُ لَا أَتَفَرَّغُ لِذَلِكَ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ أَتَصَدَّقُ بِخَمْسِمِائَةٍ مَكَانَ ذَلِكَ قَالَ الْحَجُّ أَفْضَلُ قُلْتُ أَلْفٍ قَالَ الْحَجُّ أَفْضَلُ قُلْتُ فَأَلْفٍ وَ خَمْسِمِائَةٍ قَالَ الْحَجُّ أَفْضَلُ قُلْتُ أَلْفَيْنِ

قَالَ أَ فِي أَلْفَيْكَ طَوَافُ الْبَيْتِ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ أَ فِي أَلْفَيْكَ سَعْيٌ بَيْنَ الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ أَ فِي أَلْفَيْكَ وُقُوفٌ بِعَرَفَةَ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ أَ فِي أَلْفَيْكَ رَمْيُ الْجِمَارِ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ أَ فِي أَلْفَيْكَ الْمَنَاسِكُ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ الْحَجُّ أَفْضَلُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Ibrahim Bin Maymoun who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I perform Hajj one year and my associate performs Hajj one year’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What is preventing you from the Hajj, O Ibrahim?’ I said, ‘I am not free for that, may I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>. I tend to give in charity with five hundred in place of that’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Hajj is superior’. I said, ‘A thousand?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Hajj is superior’. I said, ‘So a thousand and five hundred?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Hajj is superior’. I said, ‘Two thousand?’

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is there, in your two thousand, a circumambulation of the House (Kabah)?’ I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is there, in your two thousand, a Sa’ee between Al-Safa and Al-Marwa’. I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is there, in your two thousand, a pausing at Arafat?’ I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is there, in your two thousand, pelting of the rocks?’ I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is there, in your two thousand, the rituals?’ I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Hajj is superior’.
en.sarwar: 28. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jundab who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ’ Al-Hajj is Jihad (hard work for the cause of Allah) of the weak people.’ Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, then placed his hand on his chest and said, ‘We are the weak people, (we) are weak.’”
